positive: A majestic, minimalist mountain cityscape silhouette against a dramatic, vivid gradient sunset. The scene features clean geometric mountain peaks, stylized with sharp angles and deep indigo, contrasted against warm hues of electric orange, magenta, and gold in the sky. In the foreground, abstract, stylized elements like crescent moons and wandering constellations are rendered using fine, luminous white lines. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and central. High contrast, graphic vector illustration style, perfect for apparel printing, clean lines, deep saturation, flat colors.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, trademark, copyright, busy background, photographic, realistic, gradients, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, low detail
